blocks.content: Rules of the Holy War (4)

blocks.speaker: High Priest
blocks.content: High Priest.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: Seeing High Priest Maximus's face, Lucia was overwhelmed with sorrow.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: I'm so sorry.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: He was the priest she admired most after the Pope, and yet she had inflicted grave injuries upon him.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: I never meant to hurt him.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: She believed it was because she had lost control of her emotions—anger when he opposed her relationship with Glenn had triggered her unholy powers, a sin she thought she bore alone.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: This is my trial.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: She resolved to subdue the demon within her left hand and prove her innocence to High Priest Maximus.
As memories of the past unfolded, Lucia saw the younger Maximus staring at her 17-year-old self with a blank expression.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: Did that happen? She couldn't recall. At the time, she had no idea how important Maximus would become.
But now, knowing more about him, she noticed something unsettling in his gaze.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: That expression doesn't suit him.
Suddenly, time twisted again, and Lucia found herself witnessing not her own past but Maximus's.

blocks.speaker: Aileen
blocks.content: Aileen.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: The scene showed a young Maximus blushing in front of a woman.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: Who is she? Though not identical, the woman bore a striking resemblance to Lucia.
Time rewound further.

blocks.speaker: Woman
blocks.content: Eat your soup, sweetheart

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: said a woman as she fed the toddler Maximus.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: Why? The woman resembled Aileen and Lucia.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: Why am I seeing this?
The scene shifted back to the seminary.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Who's that?

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: The supervising nun answered proudly, "She's the most outstanding candidate here, with extraordinary divine power."

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: I see

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: This time, Lucia remembered. Maximus had spoken briefly with her, encouraging her to work hard so she could one day serve the Church.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: Those words changed my life.
That night, Lucia saw Maximus tossing and turning on a makeshift bed.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: I don't want to see this. I shouldn't be peeking into someone's private moments.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Aileen

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: He had loved her deeply but had been driven by ambition.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: If only I could turn back time, he thought. If I could return to the moment she confessed her love—the first and last time.
Lucia watched in shock as the memory showed Maximus heading to the female trainees' dormitory—a forbidden area for men, even high priests.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: Cautiously, Maximus opened the door marked with Lucia's name. Inside, the 17-year-old Lucia was fast asleep.
He stood silently, gazing at her, before taking a deep breath.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Why does God take only my soul, leaving my body trapped in this world?

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: When he had first seen Lucia in the chapel, Maximus had wondered, Could this be undone?
As his hand reached toward her, the present-day Lucia was overcome with dread.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: No! Don't do it!

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: Even if he could turn back time, she believed he would have still chosen to become High Priest.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: Don't make foolish choices just because you're now burdened by regrets.
Maximus caught his reflection in a mirror. He was no longer the vibrant youth he once was but a revered Church authority, possessing everything the world could offer.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Furious with himself, Maximus turned and returned to his chamber. He knelt, took a wooden needle, and stabbed his thigh repeatedly.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Lord, forgive my desires, echoed voices from the seminary.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Grant me the strength to serve you. Make me a High Priest.
Cause.

blocks.speaker: Man with pyramid-shaped head
blocks.content: If life is the sum of all causes accumulated from birth… does humanity truly have the power to determine its outcome?

blocks.speaker: Man with pyramid-shaped head
blocks.content: One without cause, are you trying to become a god?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You're wrong

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I may lack a cause, but my will endures.

blocks.speaker: Man with pyramid-shaped head
blocks.content: It endures through the heart.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I, too, have wrestled with countless doubts through the flow of time

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Through those choices and mistakes, I've arrived at this moment.

blocks.speaker: Man with pyramid-shaped head
blocks.content: Yet you remain unshaken. Do you deny the foundations of your life?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's not denial

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The causes of everyone who's ever existed are etched into my memory. Yes, they're confusing and often murky, but…

blocks.speaker: Man with pyramid-shaped head
blocks.content: Understand your insignificance
A wave of temporal energy surged toward Shirone, who countered with a radiant light of Agape.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I forgive you
The explosive brilliance filled the pyramid, only for darkness to fall again.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Never underestimate the human heart

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Meeting Human had confirmed one thing for him: God exists in this place.
The High Priest Maximus lay in his chambers, resting while reminiscing about the past.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Lucia.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: When had everything started to fall apart?

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: I shouldn't have gone to the seminary that day. I ended up hurting that child.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: But if he had chosen Aileen, would Lucia have remained just another student?

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: How fragile humans are in the face of life.
A loud knock at the door broke his thoughts.

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: High Priest! High Priest!

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Enter
The door opened immediately, revealing a pale-faced priest.

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: What is it?

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Yahweh… clashing with the Inquisition?

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: Yes. That's the word going around. The Pope is away, and you're the only one with the authority to intervene.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Understood. I'll head to the Inquisition. Summon the paladins.

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: Yes. My apologies for troubling you when you're unwell.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Although Lucia's attack had caused significant injuries, his divine power had healed most of it.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Don't worry. This is why I'm here.
After the priest left, Maximus let out a deep sigh.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Damn it!

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: He had already deduced why Yahweh remained in the Vatican.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: What a troublesome man.
As he prepared to leave, a voice sounded from the corner of the room.

blocks.speaker: Aileen
blocks.content: My, you seem busy today.
Maximus froze, his body stiffening. Moments later, a slender hand rested on his shoulder.

blocks.speaker: Aileen
blocks.content: Feeling neglected? I was going to make you feel so much better today.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: …I told you, if we're caught, it's over.

blocks.speaker: Aileen
blocks.content: Hoho! Yes, you're right. I'm just a filthy demon. But who was it that let me take their purity, hmm?

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Ugh.
Maximus's face twisted in anguish.

blocks.speaker: Aileen
blocks.content: Fine, I'll leave. But are you sure you'll be okay? Your emotional sickness might relapse.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: You're the one who chose to follow the Satanic teachings. You've suppressed your desires for a lifetime to achieve your success. Can you really throw it all away now? Without the Vatican, you're just another old man.

blocks.speaker: Aileen
blocks.content: No! I…

blocks.speaker: Aileen
blocks.content: This is your reward for all your hard work. You're still the High Priest of the Church. And now, you've even found love.
As Elka pinned him to the bed and leaned in, he turned his head away.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: God, please. Please.

blocks.speaker: Aileen
blocks.content: It's fine. You've waited long enough. Sixty years, right?

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Evil knows how to exploit human weakness.

blocks.speaker: Maximus
blocks.content: Enough already.
Tears streamed down Maximus's face.

blocks.speaker: Aileen
blocks.content: I don't want to hurt you…
With Aileen's identical face, Elka gave a sorrowful smile.
The Entrance of the Moon Kingdom

blocks.speaker: Announcer
blocks.content: Moon Kingdom! Enter!
The procession's entrance drew the attention of everyone at the Delta capital.
So that's the Moon King.
Unlike the others who arrived in carriages, the Moon King rode alone on horseback, his dragon-like presence dominating the scene.

blocks.speaker: Moon King
blocks.content: Hiding in your buildings, peering like rats. No kingly dignity to be seen.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: If Paras was the origin of Kashan, the Moon Kingdom was the cradle of Jincheon.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Like Paras, their specialty was astrology and divination.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: They both practice dark arts

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Without more intel, we'll need to tread carefully.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: The biggest threat is if Paras and the Moon Kingdom join forces. Warn Yongroe to intervene if necessary.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The Holy War hasn't started yet.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Compared to the chaos surrounding simultaneous events, the Holy War preparations felt calm.
But not for long.
Another nation entered the city, catching Shirone's attention.

blocks.speaker: Announcer
blocks.content: Gustav Empire! Enter!
Though Havitz had defected to Kashan, Gustav remained a formidable nation.
Their procession rivaled Kashan's in length, and soon it reached Delta's central building.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Havitz is gone. So, who leads them now?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Who is that?

blocks.speaker: National leader
blocks.content: The Four Knights of Gustav? Weren't they dead?
Inside the emperor's carriage sat Balkhan, wearing a crown, flanked by three others with unrefined manners.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Smode, Zettaro, Natasha.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: With their abilities, they could certainly control Gustav. Politically, they have enough credibility, too. But…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The mystery lingered: Why did they come to the Holy War?
Everyone turned to Havitz, who was gorging on food in the banquet hall.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: I can hear them, you know

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Through God's frequency, he picked up on the murderous intent of the Gustav Four Knights.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Fools

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: HAHAHAHA!
Everyone in the central building turned pale. The shapes of their fears took grotesque form in Havitz's laughter.

blocks.speaker: Balkhan
blocks.content: There you are

blocks.speaker: Balkhan
blocks.content: You're here, Havitz

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Ha! HAHAHAHA!
The tension thickened.
